sentences.target: Je lis une histoire avec un roi.
sentences.reading: /ʒə li yn istwaʁ avɛk œ̃ ʁwa/

translations.fr: Je lis une histoire avec un roi.
translations.ipa: /ʒə li yn istwaʁ avɛk œ̃ ʁwa/
translations.en: I'm reading a story with a king.
translations.es: Estoy leyendo una historia sobre un rey.
translations.de: Ich lese eine Geschichte über einen König.
translations.it: Sto leggendo una storia su un re.
translations.ko: 나는 왕이 나오는 이야기를 읽고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在读一个关于国王的故事。
translations.yue: 我喺度讀一個有國王嘅故事。
translations.pt: Estou lendo uma história sobre um rei.
translations.tr: Bir kral hakkında bir hikâye okuyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đọc một câu chuyện về một nhà vua.
translations.nl: Ik lees een verhaal over een koning.
translations.hi: मैं एक राजा की कहानी पढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Διαβάζω μια ιστορία για έναν βασιλιά.
translations.nb: Jeg leser en historie om en konge.
translations.id: Saya sedang membaca sebuah cerita tentang seorang raja.
translations.sv: Jag läser en berättelse om en kung.
translations.ro: Citesc o poveste despre un rege.
translations.da: Jeg læser en historie om en konge.
translations.ja: 王が出てくる物語を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative (Mood=Ind, Tense=Pres), 1st person singular; transitive.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces a non-specific noun phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb 'lis'.
Preposition introducing a comitative prepositional phrase.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; agrees with 'roi'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Tu bouges le roi aux échecs.

translations.fr: Tu bouges le roi aux échecs.
translations.en: You move the king in chess.
translations.es: Mueves el rey en el ajedrez.
translations.de: Du ziehst den König im Schach.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在国际象棋中移动国王。
translations.yue: 你喺國際象棋度移動個王。
translations.pt: Você move o rei no xadrez.
translations.vi: Bạn di chuyển quân vua trong cờ vua.
translations.nl: Je verplaatst de koning bij het schaken.
translations.hi: तुम शतरंज में राजा चलाते हो.
translations.ja: あなたはチェスでキングを動かします。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative (Mood=Ind, Tense=Pres), 2nd person singular; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; marks a specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'bouges'.
Preposition contracted from 'à' + 'les'; introduces a plural NP, here denoting the domain 'at chess'.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of 'aux'; here refers to the game of chess.

sentences.target: On voit le roi au musée.

translations.fr: On voit le roi au musée.
translations.en: We see the king at the museum.
translations.es: Vemos al rey en el museo.
translations.de: Wir sehen den König im Museum.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在博物馆看到国王。
translations.yue: 我哋喺博物館見到個國王。
translations.pt: Nós vemos o rei no museu.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy nhà vua ở bảo tàng.
translations.nl: We zien de koning in het museum.
translations.hi: हम संग्रहालय में राजा को देखते हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは博物館で王様を見ます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun; grammatically 3rd person singular; often colloquial for 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative (Mood=Ind, Tense=Pres), 3rd person singular; perception verb.
Definite article, masculine singular; marks a specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'voit'.
Preposition contracted from 'à' + 'le'; introduces a locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au' (location).

sentences.target: Elle se déguise en roi pour l'école.
sentences.reading: /ɛl sə deɡiz ɑ̃ ʁwa puʁ lekɔl/

translations.fr: Elle se déguise en roi pour l'école.
translations.ipa: /ɛl sə deɡiz ɑ̃ ʁwa puʁ lekɔl/
translations.en: She dresses up as a king for school.
translations.es: Ella se disfraza de rey para la escuela.
translations.de: Sie verkleidet sich als König für die Schule.
translations.it: Lei si traveste da re per la scuola.
translations.zh-Hans: 她为了上学打扮成国王。
translations.ru: Она переодевается в короля для школы.
translations.pt: Ela se fantasia de rei para a escola.
translations.vi: Cô ấy hóa trang thành vua để đến trường.
translations.ar: هي تتنكر كملك من أجل المدرسة.
translations.nl: Ze verkleedt zich als een koning voor school.
translations.uk: Вона переодягається в короля для школи.
translations.hi: वह स्कूल के लिए राजा बनकर तैयार होती है.
translations.pl: Ona przebiera się za króla do szkoły.
translations.el: Ντύνεται σαν βασιλιάς για το σχολείο.
translations.nb: Hun kler seg ut som en konge til skolen.
translations.id: Dia berdandan sebagai raja untuk sekolah.
translations.sv: Hon klär ut sig till kung i skolan.
translations.ro: Ea se costumează în rege pentru școală.
translations.cs: Ona se převléká za krále do školy.
translations.da: Hun klæder sig ud som konge til skolen.
translations.ja: 彼女は学校のために王様の格好をします。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of the clause.
Clitic reflexive pronoun; part of the pronominal verb 'se déguiser', marking reflexive/medial voice.
Main verb in pronominal construction, present indicative (Mood=Ind, Tense=Pres), 3rd person singular.
Preposition meaning 'as/in'; introduces a predicate complement indicating role/costume.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'en' (role after 'se déguiser en').
Preposition of purpose; introduces a purpose/beneficiary phrase.
Elided definite article before vowel-initial noun; here stands for 'la' (feminine singular) before 'école'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour' (purpose context).

Tu bouges le roi aux échecs.
On voit le roi au musée.
Elle se déguise en roi pour l'école.

Tu bouges le roi aux échecs.

/ɛl sə deɡiz ɑ̃ ʁwa puʁ lekɔl/
en: I'm reading a story with a king.
You move the king in chess.
We see the king at the museum.
She dresses up as a king for school.
